data.title: Wu Lian Dianfeng
data.synopsis:
Yang Kai, a trial disciple and floor sweeper at Zhongdu Lingxiao Pavilion, was demoted to a trial disciple due to his poor qualifications. If he did not achieve anything within three years, he would be expelled from the sect. Yang Kai accidentally obtained a mysterious stone pillow, which opened up mysterious skills such as the Proud Golden Body. After that, he continued to practice, breaking through his own limits with his tenacious character as a young man, and finally stood at the top of the inheritance cave. Yang Kai and Su Yan inherited the mysterious skills together, and continued to start his story of becoming a legend and reaching the peak of martial arts.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Mo Mo's (莫默) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Tenohira no Haru
data.synopsis:
Deep in the white mist, there was a table where the dishes floated. Three little girls lived there, playing together happily, but they all seemed a little bored. One day, a peacock appeared, and the girls were deeply shocked by their encounter.

What you have seen is only a small part of the world. The "curiosity," "anxiety," and "emotion" that are born from encountering something new are depicted in vivid colors. Imagine yourself reading a picture book and try to get a little taste of this relaxing world.

(Source: JDN, translated)
data.background: Graduation Work 2013 by Satomi Maiya, Tokyo Polytechnic University, Faculty of Arts.

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Anpanman to Santa-san e no Tegami
それいけ!アンパンマン アンパンマンとサンタさんへの手紙

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Anpanman to Santa-san e no Tegami
data.title_japanese: それいけ!アンパンマン アンパンマンとサンタさんへの手紙
data.synopsis:
On Christmas Eve, the children are writing letters to Santa with their wishes. However, Melonpanna is alone and looks gloomy. She wants to spend Christmas with her big sister Rollpanna. Meanwhile, Baikinman is plotting some evil scheme to get all the presents for himself. Will Anpanman be able to protect the children's letters? Will Melonpanna's wish come true?

(Source: Amazon, translated)

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Baikinman to Suteki na Christmas Cake
それいけ! アンパンマン ばいきんまんとすてきなクリスマスケーキ

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Baikinman to Suteki na Christmas Cake
data.title_japanese: それいけ! アンパンマン ばいきんまんとすてきなクリスマスケーキ
data.synopsis:
Dokin-chan gets into a fight with Baikinman on Christmas Eve. Then Kokin-chan comes to invite Dokin-chan to a Christmas cake class. Meanwhile, Baikinman sulks and leaves, but heads to the venue where the cake class is being held to wreak havoc in the city... Will Anpanman be able to stop Baikinman's rampage? Will Baikinman and Dokin-chan be able to make up and have a fun Christmas Eve?

(Source: Amazon, translated)

titles.title: 0歳児スタートダッシュ物語 シーズン2
0 Years Old Child Starting Dash Story Season 2

data.title: 0-saiji Start Dash Monogatari Season 2
data.title_english: 0 Years Old Child Starting Dash Story Season 2
data.title_japanese: 0歳児スタートダッシュ物語 シーズン2
data.synopsis:
After reincarnating from her previous life as an office worker and avid gamer, Lilia Carol grew and gained friends in her new world. During her fifth birthday, she met the handsome Elk von Luxel, who left her entranced. She normally has no issue maintaining her composure, but his presence manages to distract Lilia from her usual magic practice. As their paths continue to cross, a friendship blooms between them.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Gnosia
data.synopsis:
Saddled with amnesia, Yuuri awakens on an interstellar cruiser drifting through space. Unfortunately, a lack of memories is the least of Yuuri's problems. Among the four other crew members is a Gnosia: a Gnos infectee whose goal is the eradication of humanity. The Gnosia appears human in all other respects, so the uninfected have little choice but to vote on whom they suspect to be the enemy, hoping to neutralize the Gnosia by putting them into cold sleep. If the Gnosia survives the vote, they will eliminate one crew member during the cruiser's following warp, when only the Gnosia remains conscious.

Voting quickly proves to be an unreliable strategy, and Yuuri is left one-on-one with the Gnosia. Just when all hope seems lost, time seemingly loops back to when Yuuri first awakened. With each time loop, however, conditions aboard the ship change—neither the size of the crew nor the members' identities remain constant. Trapped in both time and space, Yuuri must figure out how to escape the loops and save humanity from the Gnosia.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Gnosia adapts the 2019 video game of the same title. The series was released on Blu-ray and DVD in seven volumes from December 24, 2025, to June 24, 2026.

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Poppo-chan no Kirakira Christmas
それいけ! アンパンマン ポッポちゃんのきらきらクリスマス

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Poppo-chan no Kirakira Christmas
data.title_japanese: それいけ! アンパンマン ポッポちゃんのきらきらクリスマス
data.synopsis:
Poppo finds a "star" in the snow! She meets Anpanman and his friends, who are preparing for Christmas, and together they head off to help Santa. But then Baikinman, disguised as Steam Locomotive Man, arrives, steals the presents, and starts wreaking havoc in the town...! Meanwhile, Poppo, who has fallen asleep after drinking milk, notices the mysterious power of the "star"...

(Source: Amazon, translated)

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Kokin-chan to Christmas no Okurimono
それいけ! アンパンマン ポッポちゃんのきらきらクリスマス

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Kokin-chan to Christmas no Okurimono
data.title_japanese: それいけ! アンパンマン ポッポちゃんのきらきらクリスマス
data.synopsis:
Today is the fun, once-a-year Christmas concert! Dokin-chan, disguised, is practicing a song with Shokupanman and the others. When Kokin-chan sees this, she says, "I want to sing with you too!", but Dokin-chan just says, "No!". Kokin-chan becomes sad and starts crying as she usually does, but for some reason she seems different than usual. At first Dokin-chan was angry, but then she becomes worried and goes to look for Kokin-chan, who has run out...

(Source: Amazon, translated)

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Anpanman to Hajimete no Christmas Night
それいけ! アンパンマン アンパンマンとはじめてのクリスマスナイト

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Anpanman to Hajimete no Christmas Night
data.title_japanese: それいけ! アンパンマン アンパンマンとはじめてのクリスマスナイト
data.synopsis:
Anpanman and his friends decorate the town and prepare for Christmas night. Then Smoke Dog, who can transform into anything, arrives. Smoke Dog has never spent Christmas night because he turns into smoke and disappears in the evening, so everyone decides to head to Christmas Valley together. Smoke Dog transforms into a basket carrying presents and helps Santa, but Baikinman, who wants to defeat Anpanman today, is up to some evil plan with Dr. Hiyari...

(Source: Amazon, translated)

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Santa ni Natta Chibi wo Ookami-kun
それいけ! アンパンマン サンタになったちびおおかみくん

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Santa ni Natta Chibi wo Ookami-kun
data.title_japanese: それいけ! アンパンマン サンタになったちびおおかみくん
data.synopsis:
On a full moon night, the Little Wolf turns into a ghost wolf and goes on a rampage. The next day, he is found lying in the snow and is saved by Santa and his reindeer Rudolf. Rudolf flies through the sky with the lonely-looking Little Wolf on his back. Today is Christmas Eve. Christmas preparations are underway in the town, and the Little Wolf looks like he's having a lot of fun. The Little Wolf helps Santa deliver presents to everyone. The Little Wolf, who admires Santa, receives a wonderful present.

(Source: Amazon, translated)

data.title: Jiaonang Jihua: Yingxiong
data.synopsis:
"Capsules Project" is a collection of domestically produced animated short films created by a professional team with mature animation production experience. With the creative theme of "extreme emotions + independent themes," it does not restrict the creative form, exploring the possibilities of animation together with the team. The aim is to collaboratively create animated short films with diverse styles and characteristics, and to help Chinese animators reach the world stage. Just as there are a thousand Hamlets in a thousand people's hearts, this season's theme is "Hero." Based on their chosen emotional combinations, the team will write their own story of a "hero."

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: お兄さんおひとりですか?

data.title: Oniisan Ohitori desu ka?
data.title_japanese: お兄さんおひとりですか?
data.synopsis: A man who finds himself alone on a beach. Luckily for him, a girl with huge breasts keeps him company. After she seduces him, they both go to a secluded place to have sex.

data.title: Yowayowa Sensei
data.synopsis:
When the new term starts, second-year student Abikura discovers that his homeroom teacher is none other than Hiyori Hiwamura, infamously known as "Scary-Scary Sensei," a woman rumored to curse anyone who crosses her.

But one day, Abikura accidentally witnesses a completely unexpected side of his fearsome teacher after school. The striking contrast between her fearsome image and her hidden personality is utterly irresistible!

Brace yourself for Gap Moe overload in this tender romantic comedy that's sure to ignite your protective instincts!

(Source: MAL News)
